mapper.sql: member_id, company_id, user_id, user_pw, "name", email, tel_no, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn
mapper.select: /* selectMemberDetailById */ SELECT me.member_id, me.company_id, , me.user_id, me.user_pw, me."name", me.email, me.tel_no, me.del_yn FROM member me WHERE me.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( company_id, user_id, user_pw, name, email, tel_no, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{name}, #{email}, REPLACE(#{telNo}, '-', ''), #{regId}, NOW(), #{chgId}, NOW(), 'N' )

INSERT INTO user_role ( member_id, role_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{userRole.memberId}, #{userRole.roleId}, #{userRole.regId}, NOW(), #{userRole.chgId}, NOW(), #{userRole.delYn} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_role SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.delYn}
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN del_yn
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.chgId}
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN chg_id
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userRole.chgDt}, NOW())
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id = CASE
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.delId}
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN del_id
ELSE del_id END, del_dt = CASE
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userRole.delDt}, NOW())
WHEN (member_id = #{userRole.memberId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE del_dt END WHERE (member_id, role_id) IN
(#{userRole.memberId}, #{userRole.roleId})
UPDATE member SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT mem.member_id, mem.company_id AS user_company_id, mem.user_id, mem.user_pw, mem."name", mem.email, mem.tel_no, mem.reg_id, mem.reg_dt, mem.chg_id, mem.chg_dt, mem.del_yn, ro.role_name AS roles FROM member mem LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ur.member_id = mem.member_id AND ur.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN role ro ON ro.role_id = ur.role_id AND ro.del_yn = 'N' WHERE mem.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT mem.member_id, mem.company_id AS user_company_id, mem.user_id, mem.user_pw, mem."name", mem.email, mem.tel_no, mem.reg_id, mem.reg_dt, mem.chg_id, mem.chg_dt, mem.del_yn, ro.role_name AS roles FROM member mem LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ur.member_id = mem.member_id AND ur.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN role ro ON ro.role_id = ur.role_id AND ro.del_yn = 'N' WHERE mem.member_id = #{memberId} AND mem.del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user WHERE member_id = #{memberId} )
mapper.sql: member_id, user_id, name, email, user_pw, tel_no, last_login_dt, login_fail_cnt, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM member
AND member_id IN
#{memberId}
AND name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.name} || '%'
AND email ILIKE '%' || #{filter.email} || '%'
AND telNo ILIKE '%' || #{filter.telNo} || '%'
AND del_yn = #{filter.delYn}

SELECT ur.member_id, ur.role_id, ur.reg_id, ur.reg_dt, ur.chg_id, ur.chg_dt, ur.del_id, ur.del_dt, ur.del_yn FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN member u ON ur.member_id = u.member_id WHERE (ur.member_id, ur.role_id) IN
(#{userRole.memberId}, #{userRole.roleId})
